electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 25-200 (low frequency limit -10 dB: 25 Hz with SB10_60, 27 Hz with SB10_100, 29 Hz with SB10_200; upper limit 60/100/200 Hz set by preset)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4. Per preset (LA4X/LA7.16i/LA12X or LA2Xi bridge): SB10_60 = 119 dB, SB10_100 = 122 dB, SB10_200 = 124 dB. With LA2Xi single-ended: 119/120/122 dB.
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional in standard configuration (nominal directivity -6 dB rated as standard configuration)
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 10" cone driver in a bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents laminar vents

amplification.per_amplifier_note: Per-output / total drive capacity: LA2Xi 2/8 (SE), 1/2 (BTL); LA4X 2/8; LA7.16i 2/32; LA12X 3/12. Reduced max SPL/drive capacity applies when using LA2Xi.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in (push-cage) connection; internal pinout IN+/IN- to transducer LF+/LF-
connection.wiring_note: Connector sealing plate (provided) has two cable glands (input and link to next enclosure), compatible with cables up to 2 x 2.5 mm2 gauge; for IP55-rated installation use. Amplifier-side connection uses terminal block output (LA2Xi SE / LA7.16i) or bridged terminal block output (LA2Xi BTL) with 2.5 mm2 cable.

physical.dimensions_mm: 539 x 539 x 178 (W x H x D; front face 539 x 539, depth 178 mm)
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel grill with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; finishes dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order; rotatable front logo

modes: in-wall / in-ceiling / in-tile recessed integration (SB10r versions)
rigging_accessories: SB10i-onCW on-wall/on-ceiling mounting interface (two surface-mounting plates, four silent blocks, fasteners; net weight 1 kg)
12 x M6 inserts on the bottom for accessories
placeholder screws for unused inserts (to prevent acoustic leaks)

usage: Ultra-compact 10" subwoofer for discreet fixed-install work (residential, hospitality, retail, museums); extends LF down to 25 Hz for small point-source or colinear main systems.

Drive one channel per cabinet from any of LA2Xi, LA4X, LA7.16i, or LA12X; an LA12X carries up to 12 enclosures (3 per output), an LA7.16i up to 32 (2 per output), an LA4X up to 8, and an LA2Xi up to 8 in SE or just 2 in bridged mode.

Choose preset by integration goal: SB10_60 (60 Hz upper limit) when run separated from the mains for the widest bandwidth, SB10_100 or SB10_200 for coupled configurations needing more output (up to 124 dB) and higher crossover.
Expect reduced max SPL and drive capacity when powered by LA2Xi versus the larger controllers; size the amplifier accordingly for level-critical rooms.
Mount on-wall or on-ceiling with the SB10i-onCW interface, ground-stack on the supplied runners, or specify SB10r recessed variants for fully hidden in-wall/in-ceiling/in-tile integration.
IP55-rated with a sealing plate and dual cable glands (up to 2 x 2.5 mm2), so it suits damp or semi-exposed installs; always refit placeholder screws in unused M6 inserts to avoid acoustic leaks.
